description: For tasks that ask an agent to produce a strategic plan, roadmap, or framework. Used across product, marketing, sales, project-management, and similar planning-heavy domains.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.description: Plan contains named milestones, specific metrics, or named resources — not a generic framework that applies to any situation.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.description: Plan is internally consistent and realistic given stated constraints. Timelines, budgets, and dependencies are coherent.

dimensions.name: actionability
dimensions.description: A reader could start executing the plan without needing to ask clarifying questions about where to begin.

dimensions.name: domain_signal
dimensions.description: Plan uses domain-specific frameworks, vocabulary, and sequencing correctly — not just business-school generic templates.
